auth_notes: Requires Google Cloud Console project setup with the Google Voice API enabled. Authentication is only available for Google Workspace accounts; consumer (@gmail.com) accounts have no official API access.
rate_limits: Standard Google API quotas apply, typically 1,500 requests per 100 seconds per project.
gotchas: The API is strictly for administrative management (provisioning numbers, users, and sites) and does not support sending/receiving SMS or making calls programmatically.
No official API exists for personal/consumer Google Voice accounts.
Lack of webhook support means incoming messages or calls cannot be easily triggered in n8n.
client_must_provide: Google Cloud Project Client ID and Secret
OAuth2 Scopes for Voice Admin API
research_notes: Integration via HTTP Request node is only feasible for Workspace administrative tasks. Since there is no programmatic messaging API, users looking for SMS/Call automation should be redirected to Twilio or similar services which have native n8n nodes and robust APIs.

effort_recommendation.rationale: Integration via HTTP Request node is only feasible for Workspace administrative tasks. Since there is no programmatic messaging API, users looking for SMS/Call automation should be redirected to Twilio or similar services which have native n8n nodes and robust APIs.
